prerequisites.value: Combat Expertise, worship of the associated deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you confirm a critical hit against a creature, you can choose to forgo the effect of the critical hit and grant a critical hit to the next ally who hits the creature with a melee attack before the start of your next turn. Your attack only deals normal damage, and the next ally automatically confirms the hit as a critical. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: When you confirm a critical hit, you can spend 10 stamina points to use Butterfly’s Sting without forgoing your own critical hit.
